action.reasoning: Observation: v10 reactive gives only ~19 avg safe_steps (max 63<<500), 0 real success, found_rate=0, avg_dist stuck at 5m (policy fails to approach dynamic humanoid). Test confirms exact thresholds (500 steps in [1,2)m with |angle|<0.2618rad). Aggregation bug in test (claimed nav_seek_success=1.0 despite all False). Analysis: reactive P-controller + OA too myopic for random oracle target + obstacles; literature SPF heuristic reaches ~0.5 follow-rate by using map-aware shortest paths to moving goal. Root cause: no global planning to human world-pos. Decision: implement v11 hybrid (ShortestPathFollower to sim.get_agent_state(1).position when far, falls back to tuned reactive facing/dist-matching/speed-match when close; goal_radius=1.5; depth OA override; exact safe counting with config angle). Rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated test_full_episode.py + predict.py with clean HeuristicPolicy class, fixed aggregation/JSON (safe>=500 for success, recursive serializable, output dir, per_episode dicts with all required keys), full diagnostics. Update train.py to v11. Run test_full_episode.py to validate improvement before submit_eval on predict.py.
